Title: Sage Green Pocket Graphic Tee - Unisex Crewneck Casual T-Shirt
Description:
Elevate your everyday style with this effortlessly comfortable pocket t-shirt. Featuring a soft, flattering fit and a subtle, charming graphic pocket detail, this tee is designed to be your new go-to staple for any casual occasion.

  • All-Day Comfort: Crafted from a breathable, soft-touch fabric that feels great whether you're running errands or relaxing at home.
  • Versatile Style: The classic crewneck silhouette paired with the detailed pocket gives the tee a polished, yet laid-back look that pairs with everything from jeans to shorts.
  • Durable Quality: Designed for longevity, the material maintains its soft texture and shape, wash after wash.

This versatile shirt makes a perfect gift for friends, family, or even yourself. Use it for casual outings, weekend brunches, or simply as reliable, comfortable everyday wear. Layer it up or wear it alone—it's the ideal foundational piece for a capsule wardrobe.
